title: Restore language options to include Jharkhand local languages, Hindi, English, and Bangla

requirements.text: Restore the preferred languages multi-select options in Step 3 (Basic Details) to include all Jharkhand local languages (e.g., Santali, Mundari, Ho, Kurukh/Oraon, Nagpuri, Khortha, Kurmali, Panch Pargania) along with Hindi, English, and Bangla — exactly as they existed before the unintentional modification.

quotes: before it was jharkhand local languages with hindi english bangla

acceptanceCriteria: The language multi-select in Step 3 lists Jharkhand local languages: Santali, Mundari, Ho, Kurukh (Oraon), Nagpuri, Khortha, Kurmali, and Panch Pargania.
Hindi, English, and Bangla are included in the language options.
All language options are selectable via the multi-select component.
The language options in frontend/src/features/survey/options.ts reflect the full restored list.

requirements.text: Update the LanguageSwitcher component and i18n translation files to add Bangla (Bengali) as a supported UI language alongside the existing English and Hindi options.

quotes: before it was jharkhand local languages with hindi english bangla

acceptanceCriteria: The LanguageSwitcher dropdown displays Bangla (Bengali) as a selectable UI language.
A Bangla translation file (bn.ts) is added under frontend/src/i18n/translations/ mirroring the structure of en.ts and hi.ts.
The translations index (frontend/src/i18n/translations/index.ts) exports the Bangla translations and includes 'bn' in the Language type.
Selecting Bangla in the switcher renders all UI text in Bangla.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not alter existing English or Hindi translation content — only add new Bangla translations.
nonGoals: Adding any new survey steps or form fields.
Changing the backend data model or survey submission format.
Adding languages other than Jharkhand local languages, Hindi, English, and Bangla.
